selection_rule: Maximize the equal-weight mean of dense top-1 hit rate, dense no-result accuracy, hybrid top-1 hit rate, and hybrid no-result accuracy. Break ties by dense MRR, hybrid MRR, dense Recall@3, then the highest threshold for more conservative abstention.
limitations: Settings were selected only on the calibration partition.
The held-out test partition has not been constructed or evaluated.
Calibration results are development evidence, not publication-level final performance.
